name: vault-maintenance-queue
description: Example declarative extension that scaffolds a vault maintenance queue with Forge's supported vault-health view, local link widgets, task metadata, and safe Markdown transforms.

permissions.reason: Reads local link, tag, task, and publish metadata already indexed by Forge for maintenance triage.
Writes bounded checklist, sorting, and heading cleanup transforms into the current maintenance note when requested.

contributes.label: Maintenance queue metadata
contributes.description: Declares fields useful for Markdown repair queues and vault maintenance triage notes.

contributes.label: Link health
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported link-health sidebar widget for broken-link triage.

contributes.label: Backlinks
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported backlinks sidebar widget for repair context.

contributes.label: Tasks
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task sidebar widget for maintenance action items.

contributes.label: Tags
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported tag sidebar widget for grouping cleanup work.

contributes.label: Vault health
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported vault-health workspace view as the repair queue surface.

contributes.label: Convert repair lines to checklist
contributes.description: Declares the supported checklist transform for turning repair notes into action items.

contributes.label: Sort repair queue lines
contributes.description: Declares the supported line sorting transform for queue cleanup.

contributes.label: Normalize maintenance headings
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for maintenance reports.
